# Official Submission

- Track: `Track 1` / `Track 2` / `Track 3`
- Team name:
- Application name:
- PR title follows: `Track <1|2|3>, <Team name>, <Application name>`

# Summary

- What changed:
- Why it changed:

# Specification and Verification

- Change level: `S0` / `S1` / `S2` / `S3`
- Spec ID or reason for `S0/no-spec`:
- Verification commands and evidence:
- Risk and rollback:

# Checklist

- [ ] I used English for this PR title and submission materials.
- [ ] The PR title follows the official Track/Team/Application format.
- [ ] This PR contains only the files needed for this change.
- [ ] No secret, token, private URL, or personal path is included.
- [ ] Relevant tests and checks have been run, or the reason is stated above.
